name: FromBase64String Command Line Detected
description: Detects the use of the 'FromBase64String' method in command-line arguments. This is often used to decode encoded commands or payloads, and while legitimate uses exist, it's frequently seen in malicious activity.

prompts.prompt: Suspicious use of 'FromBase64String' detected in a command line, indicating potential decoding of malicious commands or payloads. Event Details: **Timestamp** {timestamp}, **Event ID** {event_id}, **Process GUID** {process_guid}, **Process Path** {process_path}, **Image** {image}, **User** {user}, **Command Line** {command}, **Parent Process Name** {parent_process_name}, **Parent Process GUID** {parent_process_guid}. Investigate this activity for encoded malicious code execution.

parameters.name: timestamp
parameters.description: The timestamp of the process creation event.

parameters.name: event_id
parameters.description: The Event ID for Process Creation (1).

parameters.name: process_guid
parameters.description: The GUID of the process that executed the command.

parameters.name: process_path
parameters.description: The full path of the executable image (e.g., powershell.exe, cmd.exe).

parameters.name: image
parameters.description: The name of the executable image (e.g., 'powershell.exe', 'cmd.exe').

parameters.name: user
parameters.description: The user account under which the command was executed.

parameters.name: parent_process_name
parameters.description: The name of the parent process that spawned this process.

parameters.name: parent_process_guid
parameters.description: The GUID of the parent process.
